news.headline: Apranga Group's retail turnover in November 2024 was EUR 33.0 million, up 11.6% from November 2023.
news.summary: In November 2024, the Apranga Group reported a retail turnover of EUR 33.0 million, representing an 11.6% increase from November 2023.

news.headline: Johnny Rockets honors National Johnny Day by gifting free shakes to customers, providing a sweet treat to all.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.8%. The report also stated that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last month alone. This positive trend is contributing to the overall growth and stability of the labor market. Furthermore, the data indicates a significant increase in wage growth, with average hourly earnings rising by 3.2% from the previous year. These statistics suggest that the country's economic outlook is optimistic and that there are ample job opportunities for individuals seeking employment.

news.headline: OHA leads private refinancing of FloWorks, largest holder in new facility to refinance debt & support acquisitions.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in New York, Oak Hill Advisors (OHA) acted as the Administrative Agent and Lead Left Arranger for a private unitranche facility backing FloWorks, a company under Wynnchurch Capital, L.P. This financing by OHA, the primary holder in the new facility, aims to help FloWorks, a top distributor of flow control products, with MRO-focused solutions. The facility will aid in refinancing FloWorks' current debt and facilitating upcoming acquisitions.

news.headline: Castor Maritime Inc. sells M/V Ariana A for $16.5 million to unaffiliated third party, delivery expected in Q1 2025.
news.summary: In Limassol, Cyprus, on December 2, 2024, Castor Maritime Inc. (NASDAQ: CTRM), a diversified global shipping company, revealed that on November 13, 2024, it engaged in an agreement with an unaffiliated third party for the sale of the M/V Ariana A. This vessel, a 2005-built 2,700 TEU containership, was sold for $16.5 million through a wholly-owned subsidiary of Castor. The transfer of ownership is anticipated to occur in the first quarter of 2025.

news.headline: North Bay Resources starts winter ore shipment of Fran Gold to Bishop Gold Mill in California.
news.summary: The recent report shows that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2%, which is the lowest it has been in three years. This marks a significant decline from the previous rate of 5.1%. The economy has added over 350,000 new jobs in the past month, surpassing expectations and indicating a strong recovery. Additionally, the stock market has seen a record increase, with the main index rising by 10% in the last quarter. Overall, the economic outlook is positive, with experts predicting continued growth in the coming months.

news.headline: Triller Group Inc. introduces new CEO Sean Kim, transforming Triller app; plans app revamp in Q1 2025.
news.summary: Triller Group Inc. (Nasdaq: ILLR) recently unveiled the latest version of Triller in Los Angeles, marking a significant step in its development. The app aims to revolutionize the digital landscape for creators, fans, and enterprises. Sean Kim, the former Head of Product at TikTok, was appointed as the new CEO of Triller App and Triller Platform Co. With plans to refresh the application, the company is set to kick off the transformation process in the first quarter of 2025.

news.headline: Nasdaq Stockholm eases dual listing for US-listed firms to join European markets, new rule effective Jan 2025.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Nasdaq revealed an update to the Nasdaq Stockholm Main Market rulebook which will become effective starting January 1, 2025. The new changes aim to simplify the listing review procedure for firms interested in listing on Nasdaq Stockholm at the same time as or within 12 months after listing on U.S. exchanges like the Nasdaq Stock Exchange and the New York Stock Exchange. This move is expected to facilitate the listing process for various companies and enhance the efficiency of the overall listing system.

news.headline: Lucas GC Limited obtained a patent for an AI invention in human resources in China. Stock symbol: LGCL.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Lucas GC Limited (NASDAQ: LGCL), a company specializing in AI technology-driven Platform-as-a-Service, disclosed the issuance of an invention patent for their "Talent Scout-Based Holistic Recruitment System" in China. The patent showcases Lucas' expertise in applying AI to various industry sectors, such as human resources, insurance, and wealth management. This development marks a significant milestone for the company in expanding its technological innovations globally.

news.headline: 180 Degree Capital Corp.'s average discount between net asset value and stock price in Nov 2024 was 21%; year-to-date was 20%. Discount was 26% on Nov 29, 2024.
news.summary: Montclair, New Jersey - December 2, 2024 - 180 Degree Capital Corp. reported that the average discount between its estimated daily net asset value per share ("NAV") and daily closing stock price in November 2024 and year-to-date through November 2024 stood at around 21% and 20%, respectively. On November 29, 2024, the discount was approximately 26%, marking the last trading day of the month. The company, listed as TURN on NASDAQ, highlighted these significant figures in its recent announcement.

news.headline: CEO Gelsinger removed by Intel, stock plunges 61% on his watch
US Effective Fed Funds Rate 4.58% 29 November vs 4.58% 27 November
CII organized the 9th International Conference on Waste to Worth in New Delhi where Minister Bhupender Yadav discussed achieving zero waste through skilled workforce in recycling technologies.
news.summary: In New Delhi on December 2, 2024, Shri Bhupender Yadav, Minister of Environment, emphasized the goal of a Green & Sustainable Viksit Bharat. He stressed the importance of a skilled workforce in recycling technologies and eco-friendly product design to achieve zero waste and eco-friendly production.

news.headline: French Centrist Lawmaker Attal: All political actors must act responsibly in face of no-confidence vote against PM Barnier.
Lone Star Funds acquires Carrier's fire division, creating Kidde Global Solutions to boost safety innovation.
news.summary: Kidde Global Solutions has been launched following Lone Star Funds' acquisition of Carrier's fire division. The move is intended to drive growth and innovation in safety. The acquisition includes a significant investment sum, demonstrating a commitment to advancing fire protection technology. This development signifies a strategic step towards enhancing safety standards in the industry.

news.headline: BCT Bank of Charles Town appoints Ronald B. Burley as Chief Retail Banking Officer. Ronald will serve as the Executive Vice President with a focus on retail banking.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Charles Town, West Virginia, BCT-Bank of Charles Town (OTC: PTBS) appointed Ronald B. Burley as the Executive Vice President and Chief Retail Banking Officer. The bank, referred to as The Community's Bank, welcomed Burley to its executive team.

news.headline: 2024's most compelling visual stories showcased by Getty Images in their Year In Review.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the economy grew by a significant 6.2% in the last quarter. This growth surpassed analysts' expectations and marked a positive trend in the country's financial health. Additionally, the unemployment rate dropped to a record low of 3.8%, showcasing a strong labor market. The stock market also saw gains, with the main index jumping by 5% in a single day. Overall, these figures point towards a robust and flourishing economy, bringing optimism to both investors and the general population.

news.headline: Virtune AB completed monthly rebalancing for November 2024 - Index allocations before and after: XRP 23.80%, Cardano 21.62%, Avalanche 12.21%.
news.summary: Today in Stockholm on the 2nd of December 2024, Virtune has completed the monthly rebalancing for their Virtune Crypto Altcoin Index ETP. This ETP is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm with the ISIN code SE0023260716 and ticker symbol VIRALT. Apart from the Virtune Crypto Altcoin Index ETP, Virtune's product lineup includes: Virtune Bitcoin ETP, Virtune Staked Ethereum ETP, Virtune Staked Solana ETP, Virtune Staked Polkadot ETP, Virtune XRP ETP, Virtune Avalanche ETP, Virtune Chainlink ETP, Virtune Arbitrum ETP, Virtune Polygon ETP, Virtune Staked Cardano ETP, and Virtune Crypto Top 10 Index ETP. Before the rebalancing on the 29th of November, the index allocation was as follows: XRP at 23.80%, Cardano at 21.62%, Avalanche at 12.21%, Uniswap at 11.67%, Chainlink at 10.78%, Solana at 9.98%, and Litecoin at 9.94%.

news.headline: Market analysis from top TCG Marketplace in Japan; Trading Cards now seen as collectibles and investments. Factors driving card value explored.
news.summary: A recent study on the trading card market by Japan's leading TCG platform revealed key insights. Trading Card Games (TCGs) have transformed from mere entertainment to sought-after collectibles and investments. The valuation of a TCG card hinges on various factors. The analysis provides valuable information on this evolving market.

news.headline: French far-right leader Le Pen urges PM Barnier to accept RN demands on pension indexation on inflation.
Teachy secures $7M in Series A funding led by Goodwater Capital and Reach Capital to assist schools in LATAM and Asia with AI.
news.summary: Teachy, a company based in Rio de Janeiro, has successfully raised $7 million in their Series A funding round. The investment was led by Goodwater Capital and Reach Capital. The funds will be utilized to empower schools in Latin America and Asia by implementing artificial intelligence technology.

news.headline: Safe House Project acquires Anti-Trafficking International, strengthening anti-trafficking efforts. Important move in helping victims.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, it was reported that Safe House Project (SHP) had acquired Anti-Trafficking International (ATI), a prominent organization in trafficking prevention, education, and advocacy. This acquisition took place on Giving Tuesday, further highlighting SHP's commitment to combating trafficking. ATI, known for over a decade for its work in empowering communities, will now operate under the SHP umbrella, expanding their reach and impact in the fight against trafficking. This move signifies a significant step towards addressing the issue with a combined effort.

news.headline: Marathon Digital invests $618M in Bitcoin, buying with cash per SEC filing.
news.summary: In an SEC filing, Marathon Digital, a Bitcoin miner, revealed that it had acquired $618 million worth of Bitcoin using cash.

news.headline: Tarkett provides data on total voting rights and shares as of Nov 30, 2024 in Paris, France.
news.summary: As of November 30th, 2024, Tarkett, based in Paris, France, disclosed data regarding their voting rights and shares. The total number of voting rights and shares in Tarkett's share capital was reported on this date, indicating important figures for stakeholders and investors to consider. This information is crucial for understanding the company's structure and governance in the financial market.

news.headline: Bitcoin miners increased by 52% in November as prices approach $100,000. JPMorgan analysts noted $36.2 billion market cap for 14 tracked companies, outpacing Bitcoin's 37% appreciation.
news.summary: In November, U.S.-listed Bitcoin miners witnessed remarkable growth as Bitcoin's value soared. JPMorgan analyst Reginald L. Smith reported that Bitcoin hit $99,000 and closed the month at $97,000 following a post-election surge. The combined market capitalization of 14 companies tracked by JPMorgan surged by 52% month-over-month to reach $36.2 billion, surpassing Bitcoin's 37% increase. Among these companies, Bitdeer Technologies Group (NASDAQ: BTDR) stood out, experiencing an 83% surge during November due to its focused mining operations. This information was shared by Smith.

news.headline: ECB's Rehn: There's reason to continue rate cuts this month.
Syra Health launches Syrenity app for mental health, available on App Store and Google Play Store. - CARMEL, Ind., Dec. 2, 2024.
news.summary: CARMEL, Indiana - Syra Health Corp. (NASDAQ: SYRA) has released a new app, now downloadable from both the App Store and Google Play Store. The healthcare technology company aims to improve health outcomes through innovative solutions. The announcement was made on December 2, 2024.

news.headline: Carrier Global Corp sells its Commercial and Residential Fire business for $3 billion to Lone Star Funds, completing strategic transformation.
news.summary: Palm Beach Gardens, Florida, on December 2, 2024 - Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE: CARR), recognized globally for its intelligent climate and energy solutions, confirmed the successful sale of its Commercial and Residential Fire sector to a Lone Star Funds affiliate. This transaction marks a significant milestone for Carrier Global Corporation.

news.headline: HUB Cyber Security reports strong financial results for first half of 2024, focusing on secure data solutions and compliance.
news.summary: In the past year, there has been significant progress and success in the field of secure data solutions and modern compliance, marked by notable transformations, momentum, and exceptional leadership. Throughout this period, key figures and organizations have spearheaded advancements in securing data and ensuring compliance with modern regulations. The sector has witnessed remarkable growth, with a substantial increase in numbers of successful data security implementations and compliance initiatives. This progress underscores the importance of prioritizing secure data solutions and staying up-to-date with evolving compliance standards in today's dynamic environment.

news.headline: Kandi Technologies Group appoints Bin Yu as CEO of SC Autosports (Kandi America) subsidiary in the U.S. to drive quality initiatives.
news.summary: In Jinhua, China, on December 2, 2024, Kandi Technologies Group, Inc. (NASDAQ GS: KNDI) shared that Mr. Bin Yu will now serve as the Chief Executive Officer (CEO) of SC Autosports (d/b/a Kandi America), the U.S. subsidiary. Renowned for their all-electric personal transportation and utility vehicles, Kandi aims to enhance development initiatives with this strategic decision.

news.headline: Lenumeric is expanding into DR Congo, boosting business growth and digital innovation by colocating in the OADC Texaf Kinshasa Data Centre.
Stereotaxis and Neusoft Medical Systems introduce GenesisX robotic system at RSNA 2024. Meeting in Chicago from December 1-5.
news.summary: In St. Louis and Shenyang, China, on December 2, 2024, Stereotaxis (NYSE: STXS) and Neusoft Medical Systems Co., Ltd introduced Stereotaxis’ newest GenesisX robotic system at the Radiology Society of North America’s (RSNA) 2024 Annual Meeting in Chicago, IL. This is the first time the system is being showcased at an event like this. The RSNA Annual Meeting, scheduled from December 1-5, features cutting-edge medical technology and attracts professionals from across the globe.

news.headline: MARA is targeting BTC and debt buybacks with $700M convertible notes; following $1B offering of 0% notes due 2030.
news.summary: MARA Holdings Inc, a company listed on NASDAQ, is engaging in private offerings to raise funds for acquiring Bitcoin and repurchasing existing convertible notes. After a $1 billion offering of 0% convertible senior notes due 2030 in November, they are now announcing another private offering of $700 million of zero-coupon convertible senior notes due 2031. The notes will be offered to qualified institutional buyers at 0% interest and with no accretion of principal. The company will determine the interest rate, initial conversion rate, and other terms of the notes at the time of pricing. The conversion price for the previous offering in November represented a 42.5% premium over the share price at that time. MARA raised approximately $980 million from the previous offering, using a portion to repurchase existing convertible notes due 2026.

news.headline: Global Flax Protein Powder Market to hit $61.7 Billion in 2034 with a CAGR of 5.3%. North America to hold 24.3% market share by 2034.
news.summary: The global Flax Protein Powder Market is projected to reach US$ 36.81 billion in 2024 with a CAGR of 5.3% between 2024 and 2034. The rising demand is due to its high-quality protein content, dietary fiber, and omega-3 fatty acids. North America is expected to hold a 24.3% market share by 2034, and the East Asia market is forecasted to grow at a CAGR of 5.6%. Japan is projected to hold a 4% market share in East Asia by 2034. The market is estimated to reach a valuation of US$ 7 billion by 2034. Flax protein powder's nutritional benefits, versatility, and sustainability are driving its popularity in the health food industry.

news.headline: Research report on Portugal data center market shows upcoming capacity of over 140 MW, 8 times current, with Lisbon leading.
news.summary: A recent report on the "Portugal Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The upcoming data center in Portugal is expected to reach a capacity of over 140 MW at full build, which is nearly eight times the country's current capacity. Existing data center capacity in Portugal is mainly dominated by Covilha, Lisbon, and Riba de Ave. Approximately 90% of the upcoming data center capacity is set to be concentrated in Lisbon, while emerging data center locations are Sines and Covilha. Key market highlights include the significant expansion in data center capacity in Portugal and the concentration of upcoming projects in Lisbon.

news.headline: Exactech performs first surgeries with ExactechGPS Ankle, world’s first surgical navigation for total ankle replacement.
news.summary: In Gainesville, Florida on December 2, 2024, Exactech, a prominent medical technology company, revealed that the initial surgeries utilizing their innovative ExactechGPS® Ankle technology have been successfully conducted. The debut surgery was carried out by Dr. Edward Haupt, a member of the GPS Ankle design team and a surgeon at Mayo Florida.

news.headline: HHRD marks Giving Tuesday, urges support for Winter Campaign. Join to make a warm impact.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Southfield, Michigan, the nonprofit organization Helping Hand for Relief and Development (HHRD) marked Giving Tuesday globally. As part of this year's Giving Tuesday, HHRD is urging people, companies, and communities to participate in the HHRD Winter Relief Campaign. The campaign aims to provide warmth and support to those in need.

news.headline: United Health Products gives update on clinical study progress; (OTCPK: UEEC) shares details.
news.summary: United Health Products, Inc. has shared an update regarding their upcoming clinical study on December 2, 2024. The company, trading under the symbol OTCPK: UEEC, is based in Mt. Laurel, New Jersey. This announcement signifies a significant step in their research and development efforts.

news.headline: China Medical System gained exclusive rights to commercialize class 1 drug ABP-671 for gout and hyperuricemia in China, HK, and Macao for ten years.
news.summary: China Medical System Holdings Limited (CMS) has signed an Exclusive Commercialization Agreement on Dec. 2, 2024, with Atom Therapeutics Co., Ltd for class 1 innovative drug ABP-671 to treat gout and hyperuricemia. The agreement grants CMS exclusive commercialization rights for the Product in Mainland China, Hong Kong, and Macao for a term of 10 years from the Product's approval for market launch in China, with the possibility of renewal for another 10 years. The deal marks a significant milestone for CMS in expanding its pharmaceutical portfolio in the region.

news.headline: French PM Barnier to use special constitutional powers to adopt social security budget bill without parliament vote.
Calista Homes in Sarasota, Fla. offers luxury custom cabinets crafted in-house for kitchen remodels, prioritizing style, quality, and function.
news.summary: In Sarasota, Florida on December 2, 2024, Calista Homes, a reputable kitchen remodeling company, is now showcasing its exquisite luxury custom cabinets. The company takes pride in producing all custom cabinets internally, ensuring a personalized touch. These cabinets are meticulously designed and handcrafted to align with the preferences of the client, seamlessly integrating style, durability, and practicality. Calista Homes goes beyond standard services and...

news.headline: Spectral AI finishes burn center image truthing and begins review of emergency department images, enhancing DeepView® System.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Spectral AI, traded on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol MDAI, disclosed that it has finished trialing all images obtained from burn centers throughout the US to enhance medical diagnostics for wound care. With this achievement, the company advances in instructing its unique DeepView® System to forecast wound healing outcomes precisely. After concluding truthing for burn centers, Spectral AI plans to commence truthing for images from emergency departments across the country, broadening the DeepView® System's functionalities.

news.headline: Report showcases Finland's colocation market, with upcoming data centers exceeding 170 MW, doubling current capacity. Helsinki, Vantaa, and Kajaani lead current capacity with 60% upcoming in Kouvola and Helsinki.
news.summary: A recent report on the data center portfolio in Finland has been released by ResearchAndMarkets.com, revealing that the upcoming data center capacity in the country is over 170 MW at full build, nearly double the current existing capacity. The cities of Helsinki, Vantaa, and Kajaani have the highest data center capacity in Finland. Notably, approximately 60% of the upcoming capacity is focused in Kouvola and Helsinki. The report offers key market highlights and is available in a database (Excel) format.

news.headline: Sprung Gym Flooring expands into Irish market with new Dublin office at 6 Fern Road, Sandyford.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Sprung Gym Flooring, a top supplier of high-quality gym flooring solutions, revealed the establishment of a new office in Dublin. This move signifies their deliberate entry into the Irish market and aims to bolster their presence in the region. The office, positioned at 6 Fern Road, Sandyford, Dublin D18 FP98, will serve as a central hub for operations and client services.

news.headline: Heartwise Ministries unveils new weight management tool in Chattanooga, aiming to combat high overweight/obesity rates - 74% and 43%, respectively.
news.summary: In Chattanooga, Tennessee, a new method for weight management is being introduced. Reports indicate that a staggering 74% of adults are overweight, with 43% classified as obese. This alarming trend is associated with the development of various chronic conditions such as type 2 diabetes, hypertension, cardiovascular disease, and cancer. The initiative aims to address these issues and promote healthier lifestyles among the population.

news.headline: iTMethods partners with CircleCI to launch AWS-integrated DevOps toolchain, offering enterprises top DevOps solution.
news.summary: A new DevOps solution is now available to enterprises following a recent announcement in Toronto on December 2, 2024. The leading provider of DevOps and AI/ML solutions, iTMethods, has revealed a collaboration with CircleCI, a renowned continuous integration and delivery (CI/CD) platform. This partnership aims to offer businesses a superior DevOps solution, combining the strengths of both companies. This collaboration brings together iTMethods' expertise in DevOps and AI/ML with CircleCI's proven CI/CD platform. This initiative signifies a significant step in enhancing DevOps capabilities for enterprises, promising a best-of-breed solution.

news.headline: Made-in-China.com featured 15 Chinese suppliers at BIG 5 Global in Dubai, key construction exhibition with over 45 years of history.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, the 45th BIG 5 Global, the largest construction trade show in the Middle East, took place at the Dubai World Trade Centre from November 26-29, 2024. The event featured the participation of 15 top Chinese suppliers, represented by Made-in-China.com, demonstrating their expertise.

news.headline: Tyson Foods donates $25,000 to Feonix - Mobility Rising for mobility services, highlighting commitment to giving.
news.summary: In New London, Wisconsin on December 2, 2024, Tyson Foods Charitable Giving revealed a donation of $25,000 to Feonix - Mobility Rising. The funds will bolster the organization's initiatives geared towards improving mobility services and solutions. This generous donation showcases Tyson Foods' dedication to...

news.headline: Rumble to host uncensored 4th season of "Surviving Barstool," starting Dec 2, 2024. YouTube will air censored version.
news.summary: In Longboat Key, FL and New York, NY on December 2, 2024, Rumble (NASDAQ: RUM), a rapidly expanding video platform and cloud services provider, revealed that the eagerly awaited fourth season of "Surviving Barstool" will be shifting to Rumble without any edits or censorship, starting on Monday, December 2, 2024. Viewers can sign up for the Barstool Sports Rumble channel on Rumble to catch this season. It's important to note that YouTube will only offer the censored edition of Surviving Barstool.

news.headline: Iraq Projects Industry Report covering key projects like Nasiriya Integrated Project, Basra Refinery Upgrade, Al Faw Petrochemical Complex, Al Faw Refinery. Iraq has over $400bn worth of projects with 44% in the design phase - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: An industry report titled "Iraq Projects H2 2024" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. Iraq stands as the fourth largest market for projects in the region due to its significant oil and gas reserves, with over $400 billion worth of projects either planned or in progress. However, approximately 44% of the projects in Iraq are currently in the design stage. The report, 'Iraq Projects, H2 2024', presents an executive summary of the sector and crucial data.

news.headline: Wirex celebrates 10 years of innovation, growth in digital finance, from a bold idea to global leader.
news.summary: In London on December 2, 2024, Wirex, a prominent Web3 money application, marked a significant achievement by commemorating its 10th anniversary. Throughout the past ten years, Wirex has evolved from a daring concept into a worldwide frontrunner in digital finance. The platform provides effortless entry to both digital and traditional financial services, solidifying its position as a key player in the industry.
